    PermissionBackend.getBackend(String backendName, PermissionManager manager, PEXBackendConfiguration config)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    PermissionBackend.getBackendAlias(Class<? extends PermissionBackend> backendClass)
    Returns the registered alias for a backend class, or the class name if no alias is registered.
